sources.title: Nightmares Come At Night, Les Cauchemars Naissent La Nuit 1972
sources.description: Two exotic dancers embark on an erotic relationship, which takes a turn when one of them starts to experience murderous nightmares that blur the line between fantasy and reality. The soundtrack is an English dub that sounds pretty awful. Have no idea if it follows the original script at all, but it is not like Franco's movies had carefully plotted, clever dialog.

metadata.Plot: In Zagreb, the striper Anna de Istria works in a sleazy cabaret. She is seduced by the blonde Cynthia Robins that invites her to move to her house. Ana is disturbed by nightmares, where she kills a man with a spear, and Cynthia calls Dr. Paul Lucas to treat Ana. Meanwhile, a couple that lives in the house next door spies the movement in Cynthia's house.
metadata.Writer: Jesús Franco, Josyane Gibert, Stephen G. Horatio
metadata.Actors: Diana Lorys, Paul Muller, Jack Taylor
